zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Syckerlyn於1566年4月24日出生在英國素福爾可波泰德時，她的父親William Syckerling33歲，母親Anne Rule32歲。她和Richard Robert Page至少有2個兒子。她去世於1607年之後在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Syckerlyn于1566年4月24日出生在英国素福爾可波泰德时，她的父亲William Syckerling33岁，母亲Anne Rule32岁。她和Richard Robert Page至少有2个儿子。她去世于1607年之后在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Syckerlyn was born on 24 April 1566, in Boxted, Suffolk, England, her father, William Syckerling, was 33 and her mother, Anne Rule, was 32. She had at least 2 sons with Richard Robert Page. She died after 1607, in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Syckerlyn est née le 24 avril 1566, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Syckerling, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Rule, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Richard Robert Page. Elle est décédée après 1607, à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Syckerlyn am 24. April 1566 in Boxted, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Syckerling 33 und ihre Mutter Anne Rule 32. Sie hatte mit Richard Robert Page mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1607 in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Syckerlyn è nata il il 24 aprile 1566 nel Boxted, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Syckerling, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Anne Rule, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Richard Robert Page. Morì dopo il 1607, nel Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Syckerlynが1566年4月24日にイギリススフォルクボクステドで生まれた時，父William Syckerlingは33歳，母Anne Ruleは32歳であった。彼女はRichard Robert Pageとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1607年以後にイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Syckerlyn(이)가 1566년 4월 24일 영국 수폴크 보스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Syckerling(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Rule(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Richard Robert Page(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 이후 영국 에세스에서 사망했다.

mn.Boxted, Essex, Essex, England: Boxted, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Syckerlyn nasceu em 24 de abril de 1566, em Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Syckerling, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Rule, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Richard Robert Page. Ela faleceu após 1607, em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Syckerlyn родилась 24 апреля 1566 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Syckerling было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Rule, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Richard Robert Page. Она умерла после 1607 г. в местности эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Syckerlyn nació el 24 de abril de 1566, en Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Syckerling, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne Rule, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Richard Robert Page. Murió después de 1607, en Essex, Inglaterra.
